final:
module top_module(
    input wire clka,
    input wire wea,
    input wire [6:0] addra,
    input wire [31:0] dina,
    output reg [31:0] douta  // Changed 'wire' to 'reg'
);reg [31:0] memory[0:127];

always @(posedge clka) begin
  if (wea) begin memory[addra] <= dina ; end
  end

  always @(posedge clka) begin
  douta <= memory[addra] ;
  end

endmodule
